description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a white picket fence and featuring a spacious backyard with mature trees and a hammock. The front of the house includes a covered carport and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, which is adorned with climbing plants. The structure has a simple, low-pitched roof and multiple windows distributed across its facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is landscaped with a mix of grass, trees, and a small garden area, creating a private outdoor retreat. The exterior walls are painted white, and the overall design is functional and inviting, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a carport, fenced yard, mature trees, and a landscaped garden, featuring multiple windows and a low-pitched roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entrance with climbing plants, and a glimpse of the backyard trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, mature trees, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Side/rear view showing the backyard hammock, garden area, and the side windows of the house.
